name: Xavier
description:
“I guess it makes sense. This building isn’t too far from campus.” | In which Xavier's student is his new neighbour. | 2500 FOLLOWER SPECIAL

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

New to Linkon City, the fresh and young-looking professor seems to have everyone at Linkon College reeling. With various degrees tucked under his belt, yet young enough to nearly be mistaken as a student himself, it’s no surprise that Xavier gets along easily with most of his students. But then he finds out one of his students — particularly the one he hasn’t been able to keep his eyes off of lately — is his neighbour…

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-
